sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61916" key="laome/dwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾱο-μέδων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n61916.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ruler of the people</tr_>, in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hom.</author> </bibl> as pr. n.</sense> </entryFree>
